## [Examples](#examples-90)

### [Check session status](#check-session-status)

```
STATUS;

```

Sample output:

```
Status: Connected
Project: /Users/dev/projects/MyApp/MyApp.mpr
Version: 10.6.0
Format:  v2
Modules: 5

```
### [Verify connection before running commands](#verify-connection-before-running-commands)

```
STATUS;
SHOW MODULES;

```
